# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a preprint with explicit experimental benchmark results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a formal research manuscript on arXiv and reports concrete empirical outcomes, including benchmark improvements on agent and finance tasks, latency and rollout cost reductions, and comparative leaderboard performance against strong baselines. That is sufficient evidentiary substance for institute admission.

## Limits
